programmes.show_description: (2019) Horror twist on the fairy-tale paradigm with Riley Keough. A future stepmother tries to gain the trust of her partner's children. But the kids will stop at nothing to get rid.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(2014) Jamie Foxx stars in this reboot of the 1982 musical. Orphan Annie is transported to post-2008 recession-hit New York, where she becomes the ward of a germaphobe running for mayor.
(1962) War drama. Darryl F Zanuck's classic Oscar-winning recreation of the Allied landings in Normandy on 6 June 1944, with an all-star British, American, German and French cast.
Director Michael Pearce and star Jessie Buckley talk about making the dark British drama set on Jersey.
(2020) Comedy-drama with Liam Neeson. An estranged father and son team up to fix up and sell an old Tuscan villa that their late wife and mother left to them.
(2022) Romcom with Julia Roberts and George Clooney. A staggeringly beautiful, divorced couple reunite to stop their daughter's wedding in the staggeringly beautiful surroundings of Bali.
(2000) Fact-based legal drama. Julia Roberts won an Oscar, Golden Globe and BAFTA for her portrayal of a single mum making a huge impact at a legal firm despite having no formal training.
(2020) Fighty, satirical horror that upset Donald Trump. Hilary Swank plays a rich lefty who likes hunting working class people to the death. But she didn't reckon on Betty Gilpin.
(2021) Zeitgeisty survival thriller. When the American economy tanks, oil prices plummet and the borders close, people start to panic...
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1989) Star-studded tragi-comedy with Julia Roberts, Daryl Hannah, Dolly Parton and more. Six Southern belles console and cajole each other through life in a Louisiana beauty parlour.
Director Michael Pearce and star Jessie Buckley talk about making the dark British drama set on Jersey.
(2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.
(1992) Anthony Hopkins, Helena Bonham Carter and Emma Thompson star in James Ivory's adaptation of EM Forster's novel about two families, love, treachery and revenge.
Director Michael Pearce and star Jessie Buckley talk about making the dark British drama set on Jersey.
(2010) Action-comedy starring Tom Cruise and Cameron Diaz. A CIA assassin kidnaps a woman and takes her on an impromptu round-the-world trip in order to save both their lives. Violence.
(2018) Action crime thriller sequel. Denzel Washington returns as Robert McCall, who's out for revenge after ruthless killers murder an agency contact who he also considered a friend.
(2022) Thriller starring Guy Pearce as a writer-in-hiding whose novel inspired a teenager to kill 13 people 25 years ago. And now he must revisit the past.
